Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: 'I commented on a music subculture but it's not about the music.'

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: For the love of all that is green, where do they get you people?

Line.Text: She strolls away, cradling her forehead all the while. Whatever you meant, you've become a pain in her root.
